qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Integracion.INT_MAG.QUERY
IDS
sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT T.oi_int_mag, T.c_int_mag, T.d_int_mag, T.c_type, T.c_list_mode, F.o_imagen FROM WRK04_INT_MAN as T, WRK03_FILES as F JOIN T.oi_file_wrk inner F.oi_file_wrk WHERE T.oi_int_mag in ({%=$PARAM/@IDS %}) ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sqlMain
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT WRK06_PARAMS.oi_param FROM WRK06_PARAMS WHERE WRK06_PARAMS.c_param = {#SOURCE:@c_param} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL-IM
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT IM.oi_int_mag, IM.c_int_mag, IM.d_int_mag, IM.c_type, IM.c_list_mode, IM.oi_file_wrk FROM WRK04_INT_MAN as IM WHERE IM.c_int_mag = {#SOURCE:@IM} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL-PARAMS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT IM_P.oi_param, IM_P.oi_param_x, IM_P.c_param, IM_P.d_param, IM_P.c_type, IM_P.c_io FROM WRK04_PARAMS as IM_P WHERE IM_P.oi_int_mag = {#SOURCE:@OI} and not(isnull(IM_P.oi_param_x)) order by oi_param asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL-ARGS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT IM_P.oi_param, IM_P.c_param, IM_P.d_param, IM_P.d_class, IM_P.c_type, IM_P.c_io FROM WRK04_PARAMS as IM_P WHERE IM_P.oi_int_mag = {#SOURCE:@OI} and isnull(IM_P.oi_param_x) order by oi_param asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL-STRUCTS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT IM_P.oi_param, IM_P.c_param, IM_P.d_class, IM_P.d_param, IM_P.c_type, IM_P.c_io FROM WRK04_PARAMS as IM_P WHERE IM_P.oi_int_mag = {#SOURCE:@OI} and isnull(IM_P.oi_param_x) and (IM_P.c_type=\'struct\' or IM_P.c_type=\'array\') order by oi_param asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL-PROPS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT IM_A.oi_struct, IM_A.c_struct, IM_A.d_struct, IM_A.e_orden, IM_A.c_type FROM WRK04_PARAM_STRUCT as IM_A WHERE IM_A.oi_param = {#SOURCE:@OI} order by e_orden asc, oi_struct asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SQL-PARAM-VALUES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT IM_P.d_value, IM_P.d_value_debug FROM WRK06_PARAMS as IM_P WHERE IM_P.oi_param = {$SOURCE/@param} ')/ROWS/ROW

enum-value.label: Lista de Nodos Simples de XML (Metodos Nativos)

qry:select.name: NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Integracion.PARAM.QUERY
NucleusWF.Base.Definicion.Integracion.STRUCT.QUERY
